_comment: Copy to perf/config.json and fill in coordinates (use `python3 perf/shared/drive.py coords`) and the doc path. A sequence is a list of steps run per trial; {"mark":true} flips the sync marker and starts a measured interval. Keep the marker window out of the content ROI.

sequences._open_warm_word_mac: open dialog is Cmd+O; for cold launch use perf/word/mac/word_mac.sh instead
sequences._scroll: fixed wheel cadence; START mark, scroll burst, END mark. Same numbers for both apps.
sequences._nav: scroll to top, click a fixed far heading in the nav pane. Fill the click coords per app/layout.
